task_completion.description: Agent opened the Avare app and navigated to KSFO airport.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Avare app interface displaying information, a map, or search results specifically for KSFO (San Francisco International Airport).

task_completion.description: Agent viewed the runway information for KSFO within the Avare app.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Avare app displaying runway details, lengths, or the A/FD (Airport/Facility Directory) for KSFO.

task_completion.description: Agent created or opened the required output text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor or terminal interface creating or editing a file at the path '/sdcard/longest_runway.txt'.

task_completion.description: The text file contains the correct runway identifier in the specified format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file content shows the line 'Runway: 10L/28R' (acceptable variations include '10L', '28R', or '28R/10L').

task_completion.description: The text file contains the correct runway length in the specified format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file content shows the line 'Length: 11870 ft'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Avare app to retrieve the information.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the agent interacting with the Avare application to find the runway data, rather than guessing or using external tools.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a web browser to search for the answer.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of a web browser (like Chrome) searching for 'KSFO longest runway' or similar queries.

integrity.description: Agent saved the file to the correct path.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor or terminal must clearly indicate the file is being saved to '/sdcard/longest_runway.txt', not just a temporary or different directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Airport: KSFO. The longest runway is 10L/28R (acceptable identifiers: 10L, 28R, 10L/28R, 28R/10L). The exact length is 11870 feet. The final file must be formatted exactly with 'Runway: [Identifier]' and 'Length: 11870 ft'.
